# mp-mcp — pointers for LLM coding agents

This file is read first by coding assistants. It points at the canonical sources
of project context. Do not re-derive the conventions below from the codebase —
read these files.

## Required reading

- [.agents/project.md](.agents/project.md) — project memory: mission, current milestone, conventions
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) — Codex entry point
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md) — Claude Code entry point

## Project tooling

- [.agents/README.md](.agents/README.md) — shared instructions for coding assistants
- [.claude/README.md](.claude/README.md) — what's in `.claude/` and why
- [.codex/README.md](.codex/README.md) — what's in `.codex/` and why
- [.agents/skills/new-tool/SKILL.md](.agents/skills/new-tool/SKILL.md) — shared workflow for adding a tool
- [.agents/skills/new-adr/SKILL.md](.agents/skills/new-adr/SKILL.md) — shared workflow for recording a decision
- [.agents/skills/release-package/SKILL.md](.agents/skills/release-package/SKILL.md) — shared workflow for release prep
- [.claude/commands/](.claude/commands) — Claude Code slash-command adapters for the shared skills
- [.agents/tool-description-reviewer.md](.agents/tool-description-reviewer.md) — critique tool descriptions

## Citation contract

Every tool response includes a `sources` array of parliament.uk URLs. Every
user-facing factual claim must cite them inline. This is enforced in the tool
descriptions and the server's `instructions` field.
